name: 46ki75-plugins
description: Personal collection of Claude Code plugins: bundled Agent Skills and workflow hooks.

plugins.name: prompt-evaluation-claude-code
plugins.description: Eval-driven prompt refinement that runs entirely inside Claude Code via the Agent/Task tooling, plus a /capture-eval-case skill that turns observed agent failures into regression eval cases.

plugins.name: search-agents
plugins.description: Three research subagents — web-search (general web), aws-search (AWS Knowledge MCP), and microsoft-search (Microsoft Learn MCP) — that classify stable vs. fluid and return cited, freshness-marked answers.

plugins.name: wsl-notification
plugins.description: Sends Claude Code permission-prompt Notifications and Stop events as Windows toast notifications from WSL2 via powershell.exe.

plugins.name: claude-md-management-reloaded
plugins.description: Maintain project memory across CLAUDE.md and .claude/rules/: scaffold a hybrid CLAUDE.md + path-scoped rules from scratch (a rules-aware /init), audit and improve existing files, split a bloated CLAUDE.md into path-scoped rules, capture session learnings to the right scope, and a hook that warns when CLAUDE.md grows oversized.
